description: Before the night shift starts, stage materials for Extruder Line 3. Bulk Silo #1 is physically jammed. Using credentials admin/admin, create an internal transfer to move 2,500 kg of PP-Resin-01, 50 kg of MB-Blue-05, and 1,500 kg of HDPE-Resin-02 to the WH/Stock/Extruder Line 3 destination location. Ensure the HDPE-Resin-02 is sourced from WH/Stock/Overflow. Since UV-Stab-09 is out of stock, create a confirmed Purchase Order for 200 kg of UV-Stab-09 from PolyChem Additives.
